title: Can't generate api token as an admin

posts.author: VaggelisVs20 (Vaggelis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have admin access to a monday account and when i try to generate a monday api token i can’t because it says “As a “admin” you do not have permission to generate api tokens in this account”.

Is this supposed to happen? Who has to generate a token?
